---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for figmint
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem / use case**
What are you trying to do that figmint doesn't support today?

**Proposed solution**
What would the feature look like? (UI interaction, API, exported code, etc.)

**Alternatives considered**
Other tools or workarounds you've tried.

**Additional context**
Anything else — mockups, references, related matplotlib APIs.
